situational_context: Rebuild phase week 1. First structured session (Zwift Z2, load 15) completed Apr 18. Readiness improving with excellent markers today (TR 92, RHR 50, sleep 88). Life-constrained by 2x/week sur site commute days (38km ebike, load ~21/day) and infant care. Weight down slightly (106.89→105.85 over 3d). All autonomic markers balanced — system ready for gradual load increase. Yesterday's planned Zwift skipped (scheduled too late at 20:00). Rescheduled all sessions to 11am-3pm window per preference.

recommendations.text: Execute tomorrow's easy run (Wed 11:30, 25min Z1-Z2). First run session of the rebuild — keep pace strictly conversational. Walk breaks are fine. Consistency matters more than any single session.
recommendations.measurable: ≥1 Run activity logged on 2026-04-22 with avg HR ≤130 bpm

recommendations.text: Thursday commute bike choice determines Friday load: if gravel (suffer >25), reduce Friday Zwift to 25min Z1. If ebike, proceed as planned (35min Z2). Adapting load to commute stress prevents accumulation.
recommendations.measurable: Friday session adjusted if Thursday strava suffer_score > 25

recommendations.text: Protein intake averaging ~119g/day vs ~150g target. On training days, aim for ≥140g to support muscle protein synthesis during rebuild. Add a protein-rich snack around training window.
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 days with protein ≥140g in the next 7 days

markers_to_watch.threshold: Sustaining >35 ms confirms positive trajectory; drop below 33 for >3 consecutive days → hold load steady
markers_to_watch.reason: HRV dipped from 38 to 36 over past week — still balanced but trending mildly down. Adding structured sessions could stress recovery.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Rate >1 kg/week sustained → energy availability concern
markers_to_watch.reason: Down 1.04 kg in 3 days (106.89→105.85). Could be normal fluctuation or beginning of a trend. Monitor next 2 Withings readings.

markers_to_watch.threshold: <6h on ≥2 nights in 7 days → flag recovery risk
markers_to_watch.reason: 1 night <6h this week (5.95h on Apr 19, likely baby-related). Baby sleep improving but still variable.
